_comment: Thresholds for Desktop (Electron) Release perf guard. Metrics: tokensStartMs (Home:refresh:start:tokens timestamp), tokensSpanMs (done-start), functionCallCount (#lines in function_call.log). Values are absolute; trigger when median > threshold (strategy=median).
_baseline_note: Computed from sample sessions perf-ml610t80-paers2 / perf-ml61106h-2jk7ca / perf-ml61178t-dtjyaw with +10% tolerance (median strategy tolerates 1 outlier run).
